# Greenroom

> Mid-Atlantic concert calendar with Spotify-powered recommendations.
> Aggregates shows nightly from DC, Maryland, Northern Virginia,
> Baltimore, and Richmond.

## What this site contains

- Upcoming concerts and live music events across the DMV (Washington DC,
  Maryland suburbs, Northern Virginia), Baltimore, and Richmond, VA
- Full event details: dates, venues, artists, ticket prices, availability
- Venue directory covering the mid-Atlantic music scene
- Personalized recommendations via Spotify listening history

## Key pages

- /events — Full DMV concert calendar with filters
- /events?view=calendar — Month-grid calendar view
- /events?window=tonight|weekend|week — Date-window filters
- /venues — Directory of DMV music venues
- /events/[id] — Individual event pages with full details and pricing
- /about — What this site is and how the data is refreshed
- /api/v1/feed/events — Machine-readable plain text event feed
- /api/v1/cities — List of cities in the DMV
- /api/v1/venues?region=DMV — All DMV venues
- /api/v1/events?region=DMV — All DMV events

## Data freshness

Event listings updated nightly at 4am ET from venue websites and Ticketmaster.
Ticket pricing updated every 6 hours from SeatGeek.

## Cities Covered

DMV: Washington DC, Silver Spring MD, Columbia MD, Alexandria VA,
Tysons VA, Vienna VA, Fairfax VA, Bristow VA.
Baltimore: Baltimore MD.
RVA: Richmond VA.

## Venues Covered

Washington, DC: 9:30 Club, The Anthem, The Atlantis, Warner Theatre,
DAR Constitution Hall, Capital One Arena, Lisner Auditorium,
Echostage, Howard Theatre, Lincoln Theatre, Union Stage, Black Cat,
DC9, BERHTA, Songbyrd, Byrdland, Comet Ping Pong, Flash, Pie Shop.

Maryland suburbs: Merriweather Post Pavilion (Columbia),
The Fillmore Silver Spring (Silver Spring).

Northern Virginia: Capital One Hall (Tysons), The Birchmere (Alexandria),
Wolf Trap, The Barns at Wolf Trap (Vienna), EagleBank Arena (Fairfax),
Jiffy Lube Live (Bristow).

Baltimore: Rams Head Live!, Pier Six Pavilion, CFG Bank Arena,
Baltimore Soundstage, The Lyric, Hippodrome Theatre.

Richmond (RVA): The National, Canal Club, Allianz Amphitheater,
Altria Theater, Carpenter Theatre at Dominion Energy Center,
The Broadberry.
